articles.title: Fergus O'Neill wouldn't be 'starstuck' if Ashes call-up arrived
articles.description: The Victoria seamer now has 200 first-class wickets at under 20 after another successful spell with Nottinghamshire

articles.title: England vs India: All you need to know about the first ever Women's Test at Lord's
articles.description: Lord's will host a Women's Test for the first time when England play India from July 10

articles.title: Chase hopes Sri Lanka series win is 'a stepping stone' for West Indies in Tests
articles.description: "I've been trying for the last series and stuff but to go and actually lead from the front, it feels great," Roston Chase says after leading West Indies to series win over Sri Lanka

articles.title: Melbourne Stars advertise for new WBBL head coach
articles.description: Andy Christie will move into an assistant role while remaining head coach of Victoria in WNCL

articles.title: 'Thinking big' helps Greaves turn a corner with match-defining 180
articles.description: "I've seen a change from the last year and it's working," head coach Daren Sammy says of Justin Greaves, the Player of the Series in the 1-0 win over Sri Lanka

articles.title: New Zealand confirm four players to hold casual contracts
articles.description: While none of the quartet have featured recently in ODIs they could push for a spot at the 2027 World Cup

articles.title: Gambhir says he has given Samson 'clarity' on omission
articles.description: India's head coach felt their recent setbacks were indicative of the time that the T20I side needs given they are hitting reset after a dominant run

articles.title: 'Atrocious, awful, unacceptable' - Iyer on India's performance
articles.description: Iyer called on the players to 'start thinking how to basically make an impact' for the team after their biggest defeat in T20Is

articles.title: High-scoring draw gives West Indies rare series win
articles.description: John Campbell and Brandon King never threatened to chase down the 302-run target Sri Lanka set them in a minimum of 61 overs

articles.title: Archer, Tongue hand India their biggest T20I defeat
articles.description: Set a target of 202 after Salt 44-ball 70, India barely managed to score as many between them - 76 their second-lowest total in T20Is

articles.title: ‘Will be looking to dominate’ - Roston Chase hopes Sri Lanka series win is a 'stepping stone' for West Indies in WTC 2027 cycle
articles.description: The Caribbean side defeated Sri Lanka in the opening Test before holding on for a draw in the second, sealing their first Test series victory after 11 series.

articles.title: 'They make it so easy' - Jofra Archer makes IPL comparison after emphatic victory over India in 3rd T20I
articles.description: This comes after India suffered an emphatic 125-run defeat at the hands of England at Trent Bridge in the third T20I on Tuesday, July 7.

articles.title: WTC 2025-27 Points Table: Here's a look at the latest standings after West Indies' historic series win vs Sri Lanka
articles.description: The West Indies bagged the Test series against Sri Lanka 1-0.

articles.title: Babar Azam set to return as Pakistan T20I captain, replacing Salman Ali Agha
articles.description: PCB weighing leadership change ahead of upcoming assignments; Salman Ali Agha expected to stay in squad.

articles.title: Yuvraj Singh shares heartfelt condolences to Afghanistan's Shapoor Zadran who passed away in Delhi
articles.description: Zadran was under treatment in Delhi for Hemophagocytic Lymphohistiocytosis (HLH), a rare, life-threatening disease which affects the body's immune system.

articles.title: Abu Dhabi T10 League invites bids from global teams ahead of upcoming season
articles.description: The competitive bidding process will identify new franchises that will compete in the 2026 edition of the Abu Dhabi T10.

articles.title: 'Did these guys not learn anything from Virat?' - Herschelle Gibbs’ massive remark on Vaibhav Sooryavanshi after 3rd T20I
articles.description: Herschelle Gibbs made a massive remark on Vaibhav Sooryavanshi and the other Indian batters after the Men in Blue lost the third T20I by 125 runs on Tuesday, July 7, at Trent Bridge, Nottingham.

articles.title: ‘The best gift ever’ — Sourav Ganguly reacts as Rajkummar Rao’s first look from Dada drops on his birthday
articles.description: The first look of Dada: The Sourav Ganguly Story shows Rajkummar Rao recreating Ganguly’s iconic 2002 Lord’s celebration, with the biopic releasing on May 14, 2027.

articles.title: ENG vs IND 2026: 'No hard and fast rule that he cannot make a comeback' - Gautam Gambhir on Sanju Samson
articles.description: Three low scores saw Sanju Samson lose his place to the prodigious Vaibhav Sooryavanshi, who featured in the second and third T20Is against England.

articles.title: 'That's how you build confidence' - Anil Kumble on India's playing XI for 4th T20I between India and England
articles.description: While India have remained winless in their last five T20Is and are trailing 0-2 in the five-match series against England, Anil Kumble has urged the team management to back the players.
